objective: Deepen ctxindex module architecture across Adapters, Profiles, the public Extension SDK, CLI, and core by restoring domain ownership/locality, deleting dead prototype code and unused dependencies, and adding durable architecture verification while preserving all V1 public behavior, storage, provider I/O, package exports, and exit codes.

criteriaSnapshot.title: Source Adapter ownership is visible in the tree

status.note: owned provider Modules, discovery-based architecture contract, and 735-test gate evidenced in work/slice-1-adapter-profile-gate.md

criteriaSnapshot.title: Extension composition and Profile semantics have one owner

status.note: builtins is composition-only; Profile registry/path contracts moved to packages/profiles and provider MIME remains Adapter-owned

criteriaSnapshot.title: The public Extension SDK is deep and stable

status.note: exact 43-symbol surface, private SDK Modules, external Extension e2es, D3 relocation, and independent approval evidenced in work/slice-2-extension-sdk-gate.md

criteriaSnapshot.title: CLI command composition is uniformly thin

status.note: Action/Artifact workflow owners and automatic 18-command thin gate evidenced in work/slice-3-cli-presentation-gate.md

criteriaSnapshot.title: Registry presentation has explicit private seams

status.note: projection/schema/text/Markdown Modules and exact output gates evidenced in work/slice-3-cli-presentation-gate.md

criteriaSnapshot.title: Core contains no forbidden prototype storage path

status.note: generic Source graph/FTS cascade and unrelated-Source preservation contract; prototype sync union and dynamic Adapter-table sweep removed

criteriaSnapshot.title: Core infrastructure Modules expose one clear Interface

status.note: logger redaction/rotation owners, canonical Secrets Interface, direct capability subpaths, and root-shim removal verified by focused contracts

status.note: AST-derived import/manifests/direction gate, pruned lockfile, frozen install, build, and complete Slice 5 evidence in work/slice-5-dependency-gate.md

criteriaSnapshot.title: V1 behavior and safety contracts are unchanged

status.note: complete unit/integration/e2e, compiled CLI, D3, typecheck, and lint gates preserve V1 behavior without live provider traffic
automatic command, Adapter locality, public-import, unused-dependency, and dependency-direction checks cover discovered source entrypoints

status.note: four-part drift sweep plus 209-file incremental cartography are clean; evidence in work/final-drift-cartography.md
